eyebrow.zh: 中立 · 一条命令 · 跨客户端

headline.zh:
「Cursor 能跑、
Claude Code 不行？」
一条命令拿到证据
headline.en:
"Works in Cursor,
breaks in Claude Code?"
One command, real proof.

sub.zh: 给 MCP server 的作者：一条命令在你本机把 server 真跑一遍，告诉你它在每个客户端里行为是否一致、鉴权是否对得上，再生成一张能贴进 README 的徽章。开源、MIT，不偏袒任何客户端厂商。
sub.en: For MCP server authors: one command actually runs your server on your machine, tells you whether it behaves consistently across clients and whether its auth lines up, then generates a badge for your README. Open source, MIT, no vendor bias.

title.zh: 一条命令，跑你自己的 server

body.zh: 不用搭测试脚手架，也不用改你的 server。告诉它「你平时怎么启动 server」，它就在你本机把 server 真正跑起来、挨个客户端对照检查。内置一个示例 server，三条命令复现第一张全绿矩阵。
body.en: No test harness to set up, no changes to your server. Tell it how you normally start your server and it actually runs it on your machine, checking it against each client. Ships with a sample server — three commands to your first all-green matrix.

title.zh: 把传闻变成一张对照表

body.zh: 「在 Cursor 能跑、在 Claude Code 不行」不再是群聊里的一句传闻。你拿到一张每客户端的行为 + 鉴权对照表：哪项过了、哪项没过、没过的是哪一条检查，一目了然。今天没有别的工具能在一张表里断言「跨客户端行为一致」。
body.en: "Works in Cursor, breaks in Claude Code" stops being a chat-room rumor. You get a per-client behavior + auth table: what passed, what failed, and exactly which check failed — at a glance. Nothing else today asserts "cross-client behavior parity" in a single table.

title.zh: 鉴权对不对，跑一次就知道
title.en: Is the auth right? Run once and know

body.zh: 不用再猜你的 server 鉴权是不是按规范来的。给它一个线上地址，它真的去探一下你的鉴权是不是按各客户端期待的方式接好的——从「跳过」变成实打实的过 / 不过。
body.en: Stop guessing whether your server's auth follows the spec. Give it a live URL and it actually probes whether your auth is wired the way clients expect — turning a "skipped" into a real pass or fail.

title.zh: README 里贴徽章，CI 里挡回归
title.en: A badge for README, a gate for CI

body.zh: 一条命令写出能贴进 README 的徽章和完整报告。把检查接进 CI：哪天某个客户端从「过」掉到「不过」，构建立刻变红、拦住回归。可选检查不通过也不会误报。
body.en: One command writes a badge for your README and a full report. Wire it into CI: the day a client drops from pass to fail, the build goes red and blocks the regression. Optional checks that don't pass never cause false alarms.

headline.zh: 把「在 Cursor 能跑、在 Claude Code 不行」的传闻，变成一张可发布的矩阵
headline.en: Turn "works in Cursor, not Claude Code" hearsay into a publishable matrix

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、无付费墙。中立跨厂商一致性，没有哪个客户端厂商能独占。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, no paywall. Neutral cross-vendor parity no single client can own.

tag.zh: 中立的跨客户端 MCP 一致性，一条命令搞定
tag.en: Neutral cross-client MCP parity, in one command
